title: orchis incarnata var. angustifolia
intro: Orchis incarnata var. angustifolia, also known as the slim green- helleborine, is a perennial orchid species. It is a type of flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Orchis incarnata var. angustifolia include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
